title: Minimal East
template:
[{{ToolName}} Slide Design Guide]

Background : #fafafa (off white)

Accent : #c41e3a (Korean Red) / #1a1a1a (black)
Font : Noto Serif KR (title·Brand message) / Noto Sans KR (main text)

[Tone & Manner]
A perfect fusion of oriental understatement and modern Semiconductors tech sensibility. Samsung Electronics·SKHynix’s highest level of brand identity. A design philosophy where each blank space and one line creates presence. Deliver brand value with overwhelming presence without any excessive decoration.

[Image Principles]
Extremely restrained use of images (one image per slide). An abstract close-up of a 300mm Semiconductors wafer. One Korean red point after black and white processing. Asymmetrical layout applying the Oriental margin beauty philosophy.

[Design Characteristics]
• Extreme White Space Principle (Content 30% Below, margin 70% keep over)
• Sections separated by a single Korean red horizontal line
• Large Korean typography is the main character of the slide.
• Yin yang contrast replacement (white background section → Black background section transition)
• No decoration other than a thin 1px dividing line

[Layout Guide]
- Title Slide : 95% blank + A central one-line brand message (e.g.: "Crossing the border of nano") + bottom red horizon
- Spec Slide : Large figure on the left (example: 2nm / 100billion transistors) + Minimum description text on the right
- Comparison Slide : White/black half-and-half vertical split + Central Korean red vertical line point
- CTA Slide : full black background + White one-line strong CTA sentence
- Tone : Refined / Minimal / Brand-premium
- Slide count : 7 pages
- Font size contrast : Title 56pt serif bold / Subheading 18pt / Body 12pt
- Text per slide : Up to 25 words (impact through the power of white space))
